name: kicad-jlcpcb-skills
description: KiCad + JLCPCB PCB design skills marketplace — the most comprehensive open-source Claude Code skill suite for hardware design.

plugins.name: kicad-jlcpcb-skills
plugins.description: 27 Claude Code skills for PCB design with KiCad + JLCPCB manufacturing. Lifecycle: design → generate → verify → fix → release. Includes 115-test DFM suite, JLCPCB-specific validation, and 6 lifecycle slash commands.
